title: Turkish Sugar Kazandibi
description: A creamy, mildly spiced, and rich dessert made with dark sugar and served in a hot stone bowl.
instructions: Combine the sugar and 2 cups of water in a saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, toast the rice flour over low heat for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the toasted rice flour to the sugar mixture and whisk until well combined.
Add the ghee or vegan substitute, rose water, cinnamon, cardamom, and salt, and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a hot stone bowl and serve immediately.
Serve the kazandibi hot, garnished with a sprinkle of rose petals or a dollop of coconut cream, if desired.
